---
title: "Abandoned Burrito вЂ” Site Setup Session Notes"
author: "tonydurst"
date: "2026-03-28"
output: html_document
---

# Abandoned Burrito Site Setup

This document summarizes the work completed during the initial setup session for the [abandonedburrito.com](https://tonydurst.github.io/abandonedburrito.com/) GitHub Pages site.

---

## 1. Troubleshooting the 404 Error

The site was returning a 404 because **GitHub Pages had never been enabled** for the repository.

**Fix:** Go to Settings в†’ Pages в†’ set Branch to `main` / `(root)` and click Save.

Additional issues found:
- The `.github/workflows/jekyll-docker.yml` Action was building the site but never deploying it (missing `actions/upload-pages-artifact` and `actions/deploy-pages` steps).
- The repo had a plain `index.html` (static Bootstrap page) which does not need Jekyll at all.
- **Recommended approach:** Use "Deploy from a branch" in Pages settings вЂ” no Actions workflow needed.

---

## 2. Updating the Image

The `index.html` had a large base64-encoded image embedded directly in the `src` attribute of the `<img>` tag on line 47. This made the file 666 KB.

**Fix:** Replace the base64 blob with a reference to the `burrito.jpeg` file already in the repo:

```html
<img src="burrito.jpeg" class="..." alt="...">
```

This dramatically reduced the file size.

---

## 3. Updating the Subheading

Changed the subheading text on lines 53 and 56 (desktop and mobile versions):

- **Before:** `Just a small town boy in a big city world`
- **After:** `Has anyone seen my burrito?`

---

## 4. Removing Social Links

Removed all four social/contact links (LinkedIn, Twitter, GitHub, Email) from both the desktop (`d-none d-sm-block`) and mobile (`d-block d-sm-none`) layout sections.

Replaced with placeholder comments for future use:

```html
<!-- Links placeholder (desktop) -->
<div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center">
  <div class="col-8 text-center d-none d-sm-block">
    <!-- TODO: Add links here -->
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Links placeholder (mobile) -->
<div class="row justify-content-center align-items-center">
  <div class="col-8 m-1 text-center d-block d-sm-none">
    <!-- TODO: Add links here -->
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## 5. Changing the Background Color

Changed the body background color in line 20 of `index.html`:

- **Before:** `#3A66B7` (steel blue)
- **After:** `#C4622D` (adobe terracotta вЂ” inspired by the red rock landscapes of the American Southwest)

```css
body {background-color: #C4622D; font-family: 'Merriweather', serif; color: #FEFEFA;}
      ```

      ---

      ## Current File Structure

      ```
      abandonedburrito.com/
      в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .github/
      в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ workflows/
      в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ jekyll-docker.yml   # Not actively used
      в”њв”Ђв”Ђ burrito.jpeg                 # Profile/hero image
      в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.html                   # Main site page
      в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.rmd                    # Original R Markdown source
      в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md
      в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tonydurst.com.Rproj
      в””в”Ђв”Ђ abandoned-burrito-session-notes.Rmd  # This file
      ```

      ---

      ## TODO

      - [ ] Enable GitHub Pages (Settings в†’ Pages в†’ Branch: main / root)
      - [ ] Add future links back into the placeholder sections
      - [ ] Consider removing or fixing the unused Jekyll Actions workflow
